name: 42Crunch
description: 42Crunch — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in api security.

seo.title: 42Crunch Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete 42Crunch analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Best for vulnerability scanning in ci/cd. 42Crunch offers custom pricing.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security
cons: False positives require developer triage time

lock_in.reason: Config is OpenAPI-based, so policies portable; scans proprietary

transparency.reason: Freemium with enterprise tier priced privately

developer_experience.reason: VS Code plugin, CI integration, OpenAPI-native workflow
